markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss and align on the new marketing strategy centered around building an AI-led growth community.](https://fathom.video/share/KU88isAbMsXVngsGZWJT3sPwKDxd5dYy?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX is shifting focus to create an AI-led growth community as the core of its marketing strategy](https://fathom.video/share/KU88isAbMsXVngsGZWJT3sPwKDxd5dYy?tab=summary&timestamp=342.0)
  - [The community will house high-value content (workshops, courses, guides) and drive leads for GrowthX services](https://fathom.video/share/KU88isAbMsXVngsGZWJT3sPwKDxd5dYy?tab=summary&timestamp=386.0)
  - [Content creation and distribution will be streamlined to support this new community-centric approach](https://fathom.video/share/KU88isAbMsXVngsGZWJT3sPwKDxd5dYy?tab=summary&timestamp=706.0)
  - [Team roles and responsibilities are being redefined to support this new strategy](https://fathom.video/share/KU88isAbMsXVngsGZWJT3sPwKDxd5dYy?tab=summary&timestamp=1026.0)

## Topics

### New Marketing Machine Structure

  - [Inspired by information businesses running courses, communities, and newsletters](https://fathom.video/share/KU88isAbMsXVngsGZWJT3sPwKDxd5dYy?tab=summary&timestamp=220.0)
  - [Core focus: valuable content (workshops, courses, teardowns, guides) housed within a community](https://fathom.video/share/KU88isAbMsXVngsGZWJT3sPwKDxd5dYy?tab=summary&timestamp=306.0)
  - [Community membership provides access to all information and additional benefits](https://fathom.video/share/KU88isAbMsXVngsGZWJT3sPwKDxd5dYy?tab=summary&timestamp=367.0)
  - [Everything else in the marketing strategy drives people towards community membership](https://fathom.video/share/KU88isAbMsXVngsGZWJT3sPwKDxd5dYy?tab=summary&timestamp=386.0)
  - [Community serves as a vehicle to surface sales leads for GrowthX services](https://fathom.video/share/KU88isAbMsXVngsGZWJT3sPwKDxd5dYy?tab=summary&timestamp=395.0)

### Content Strategy and Distribution

  - [High-value content pieces (courses, workshops, webinars, written assets) will live in the community](https://fathom.video/share/KU88isAbMsXVngsGZWJT3sPwKDxd5dYy?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Content will be gated, requiring community membership for full access](https://fathom.video/share/KU88isAbMsXVngsGZWJT3sPwKDxd5dYy?tab=summary&timestamp=443.0)
  - [Sneak peeks and breakdowns of content will be used to build awareness](https://fathom.video/share/KU88isAbMsXVngsGZWJT3sPwKDxd5dYy?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)
  - [Social media efforts will focus on repackaging and distributing community content](https://fathom.video/share/KU88isAbMsXVngsGZWJT3sPwKDxd5dYy?tab=summary&timestamp=751.0)
  - [The Output (publication) will serve as the official editorial surface of the AI-led growth community](https://fathom.video/share/KU88isAbMsXVngsGZWJT3sPwKDxd5dYy?tab=summary&timestamp=906.0)

### Community Platform

  - [Considering Circle as the primary platform for the community](https://fathom.video/share/KU88isAbMsXVngsGZWJT3sPwKDxd5dYy?tab=summary&timestamp=1036.0)
  - [Key features needed: payment integration, ability to paywall content, and freemium-style access](https://fathom.video/share/KU88isAbMsXVngsGZWJT3sPwKDxd5dYy?tab=summary&timestamp=1050.0)
  - [Team to explore Circle's capabilities for hosting workshops and other content](https://fathom.video/share/KU88isAbMsXVngsGZWJT3sPwKDxd5dYy?tab=summary&timestamp=1725.0)

### Newsletter and Offers

  - [Transitioning to a newsletter under "The Output" brand](https://fathom.video/share/KU88isAbMsXVngsGZWJT3sPwKDxd5dYy?tab=summary&timestamp=1506.0)
  - [Newsletter will focus on curated content to help marketers and growth professionals](https://fathom.video/share/KU88isAbMsXVngsGZWJT3sPwKDxd5dYy?tab=summary&timestamp=1543.0)
  - [Monetizable CTAs in the newsletter will drive to community offers](https://fathom.video/share/KU88isAbMsXVngsGZWJT3sPwKDxd5dYy?tab=summary&timestamp=1596.0)
  - [Current offers include an upcoming workshop and tonight's event](https://fathom.video/share/KU88isAbMsXVngsGZWJT3sPwKDxd5dYy?tab=summary&timestamp=1346.0)

### Team Roles and Responsibilities

  - [Bianca to take ownership of event management and success](https://fathom.video/share/KU88isAbMsXVngsGZWJT3sPwKDxd5dYy?tab=summary&timestamp=2302.0)
  - [Darrell to focus on publication and podcast guest outreach](https://fathom.video/share/KU88isAbMsXVngsGZWJT3sPwKDxd5dYy?tab=summary&timestamp=1777.0)
  - [Rafid to continue managing social media content for directors](https://fathom.video/share/KU88isAbMsXVngsGZWJT3sPwKDxd5dYy?tab=summary&timestamp=2040.0)
  - [Jason to oversee overall strategy and alignment](https://fathom.video/share/KU88isAbMsXVngsGZWJT3sPwKDxd5dYy?tab=summary&timestamp=1006.0)

### Upcoming Event (Tonight's Happy Hour)

  - [Rebranding event materials to reflect AI-led growth community](https://fathom.video/share/KU88isAbMsXVngsGZWJT3sPwKDxd5dYy?tab=summary&timestamp=2454.0)
  - [Follow-up strategy to focus on nurturing leads and potentially driving sales conversations](https://fathom.video/share/KU88isAbMsXVngsGZWJT3sPwKDxd5dYy?tab=summary&timestamp=2494.0)
  - [Future events to be positioned as part of the community experience](https://fathom.video/share/KU88isAbMsXVngsGZWJT3sPwKDxd5dYy?tab=summary&timestamp=2499.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Set up the community platform (Circle) and explore its capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/KU88isAbMsXVngsGZWJT3sPwKDxd5dYy?tab=summary&timestamp=1036.0)
  - [Develop the offer for the upcoming workshop with Marcel](https://fathom.video/share/KU88isAbMsXVngsGZWJT3sPwKDxd5dYy?tab=summary&timestamp=2617.0)
  - [Write and set up the newsletter under The Output brand](https://fathom.video/share/KU88isAbMsXVngsGZWJT3sPwKDxd5dYy?tab=summary&timestamp=1506.0)
  - [Bianca to take lead on event management, starting with tonight's happy hour](https://fathom.video/share/KU88isAbMsXVngsGZWJT3sPwKDxd5dYy?tab=summary&timestamp=2302.0)
  - [Jason to discuss workshop details with Marcel](https://fathom.video/share/KU88isAbMsXVngsGZWJT3sPwKDxd5dYy?tab=summary&timestamp=2617.0)
  - [Team to reconvene in the afternoon to review progress and next steps](https://fathom.video/share/KU88isAbMsXVngsGZWJT3sPwKDxd5dYy?tab=summary&timestamp=2798.0)
